p.boldface: Application for Permission for Periodic Release to complete my ongoing Doctoral Programme

text.p: I write to formally seek for the University's permission to complete my ongoing doctoral programme at the University of Ibadan, Ibadan. I am equally requesting for periodic releases from the University in order to undertake my fieldwork/data collection component of study which is already due for execution.

I assumed duty in this University as a Graduate Assistant on 11/9/07 and subsequently re-graded as an Assistant Lecturer upon presentation of the original copy of my M.Sc certificate from the University of Lagos, Lagos on 1/10/08.

The Ph.D. programme at the University of Ibadan, Ibadan which I am still pursuing has not been impacting my usual duties at the department in any negative manner, and I will never allow it to be so affected at any point in time till I will complete it.
More emphatically, I wish to further affirm that I will take my responsibilities within the department and the larger community of this great University more seriously.
Sir, I look forward to your approval of this doctoral programme at the University of Ibadan, Ibadan, as this will enhance the quality of my contributions to this great University.
I thank the University for its usual support.
